title: Nano Banana Ultra - Image Generation Schema
description: JSON Schema for generation requests, image metadata, batch state, and gallery entries produced by Nano Banana Ultra.

generationRequest.description: Input request for generating one or more images from a prompt

id.description: Unique request ID in format req-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the generation was requested

prompt.description: The text prompt describing the desired image

enhanced_prompt.description: The prompt after template modifiers have been applied

model.description: AI model used for image generation

model_fallback_used.description: Whether auto-fallback was triggered due to primary model failure

model_originally_requested.description: The model originally requested before fallback (if different from model)

template.description: Prompt template name(s) applied, comma-separated if multiple

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio for the generated image

negative_prompt.description: Terms to exclude from the generation (Stability AI / advanced models)

variations.description: Number of image variations to generate from this prompt

output_dir.description: Target output directory for generated images

compare_mode.description: Whether to generate on all available models for side-by-side comparison

style_transfer.description: Artistic style to apply (for edit commands)

upscale_target.description: Target resolution for upscaling an existing image

source_image.description: Path to source image for editing, style transfer, or upscaling

edit_instruction.description: Natural language instruction for image editing (inpainting)

imageMetadata.description: Metadata sidecar (.meta.json) stored alongside each generated image

id.description: Unique image ID in format img-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS-{variation}

prompt.description: The original user prompt (before template enhancement)

enhanced_prompt.description: The full prompt sent to the model (after template modifiers)

model.description: AI model that generated this image

template.description: Prompt template(s) applied, comma-separated if multiple

resolution_pixels.description: Actual pixel dimensions of the generated image

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated image

file_path.description: Relative path to the generated image file from the output directory

file_size_bytes.description: File size of the generated image in bytes

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the image was generated

generation_time_ms.description: Time taken to generate this image in milliseconds

quality_score.description: AI-powered quality analysis scores (null if not yet analyzed)

prompt_adherence.description: How well the image matches the original prompt

overall.description: Overall quality score (average of all sub-scores)

tags.description: User-assigned and auto-generated tags for gallery search

variation_index.description: Which variation number this is (1-based) within a multi-variation request

total_variations.description: Total number of variations generated in the same request

request_id.description: ID of the generation request that produced this image

upscaled_from.description: Original image ID if this image was produced by upscaling

style_transferred_from.description: Original image ID if this image was produced by style transfer

edited_from.description: Original image ID if this image was produced by editing/inpainting

starred.description: Whether the user has marked this image as a favorite

cost_usd.description: Estimated API cost in USD for generating this image

negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt used during generation (if any)

batchState.description: Batch processing state tracked in .banana-batch-state.json for resume capability

batch_id.description: Unique batch ID in format batch-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the batch was initiated

source_file.description: Path to the CSV or JSON input file

total.description: Total number of generation items in the batch

failed.description: Number of items that failed generation

pending.description: Number of items not yet attempted

status.description: Current status of the batch process

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when batch processing began

finished_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when batch processing ended (null if still running)

estimated_remaining_ms.description: Estimated milliseconds remaining based on average item processing time

index.description: Zero-based index of this item in the batch

prompt.description: The generation prompt for this item

variations.description: Number of variations requested for this item

status.description: Processing status of this batch item

image_ids.description: IDs of generated images for this item (populated on completion)

error.description: Error message if this item failed

model_used.description: Which model was actually used (may differ from requested if fallback occurred)

duration_ms.description: Processing time for this item in milliseconds

items.description: Array of individual batch items with their processing status

rate_limit_delay_ms.description: Delay between requests in milliseconds for rate limiting

total_cost_usd.description: Cumulative API cost in USD for the batch so far

total_duration_ms.description: Total elapsed processing time for the batch

galleryEntry.description: Gallery index structure for browsing, searching, and managing generated images

gallery_id.description: Gallery identifier, typically date-based in format gal-YYYYMMDD

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the gallery index was last rebuilt

output_dir.description: Root output directory the gallery indexes

file_path.description: Relative path to the image file

prompt.description: Original prompt used to generate the image

quality_score.description: Overall quality score (null if not analyzed)

tags.description: Searchable tags assigned to the image

starred.description: Whether the image is marked as a favorite

images.description: Array of all images in the gallery

total_images.description: Total number of images in the gallery

total_size_bytes.description: Total disk space used by all images in bytes

average_quality_score.description: Average quality score across all scored images

images_by_model.description: Count of images generated by each model

images_by_template.description: Count of images generated using each template

images_by_date.description: Count of images generated per date (YYYY-MM-DD keys)

total_cost_usd.description: Total estimated API cost for all images in the gallery

filters.description: Available filter options derived from gallery contents

available_models.description: Models that have images in this gallery

available_templates.description: Templates that have been used in this gallery

available_tags.description: All unique tags across gallery images

date_range.description: Date range of images in the gallery

quality_range.description: Range of quality scores in the gallery

resolution_options.description: Resolution tiers present in the gallery
